name: Falafel
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions: Heat vegetable oil in a deep fryer or saucepan to 375°F (190°C). Fry falafel balls until golden brown. Drain on paper towels. Fill warmed pita bread halves with lettuce, onion slices, and tomato slices. Place one falafel into each pocket and serve hot. Makes 8 servings.
